name: Apache RocketMQ
description: Distributed messaging and streaming system donated to ASF by Alibaba; powers e-commerce and financial systems at scale.

seo.title: Apache RocketMQ — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Apache RocketMQ: Distributed messaging and streaming system donated to ASF by Alibaba; powers e-commerce and financial systems at scale.

when_to_use: High-throughput e-commerce order messaging at Alibaba scale
Exactly-once transactional messages for financial systems
Delay queues for scheduled message delivery workflows
Stream processing with RocketMQ Streams on live data
Replacing RabbitMQ with a Kafka-compatible durable broker

cons: Outside China/Java it is less common than Kafka
Operational overhead similar to running Kafka
review.verdict: Credible Kafka alternative, especially if you are Java-heavy or already operate in the Alibaba stack.
review.best_for: Java shops needing transactional, ordered messaging at scale
review.not_for: Teams that would benefit more from managed Kafka or Pulsar
